title: General Caster Changes

posts.author: tarsulowicz (Tammarie Arsulowicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am currently struggling with the General Caster app. I am no longer able to use the formula column as a column I can cast into a numbers column. I thought that was previously an available column.

Is there a change that has taken place in the last few months that discontinued this feature?

posts.author: agingerich (Amanda Gingerich)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having the same issue, I think Monday changed something on formulas bc I am having other issues with formula columns as well.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @agingerich @tarsulowicz

Hey Amanda and Tammarie

You’re right, this is due to a platform change. Formula columns are no longer treated as numeric columns, so apps like General Caster can’t cast them into Numbers columns anymore. This isn’t an app bug, but a broader monday.com update.

Common workarounds
Use a Numbers column to store the value and keep the Formula column for display only
Recreate the logic directly in a Numbers column where possible

If you’d like hands-on help or want us to walk through this live, you can book a 1:1 paid 60-minute strategy session with our team here:
Calendly

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard
